results.question: What condition did Dr. Ayaan suffer from?
results.answer: Dr. Ayaan Qureshi suffered from Essential Tremor (Stage II-III) and stress-amplified neuromuscular instability, as stated in the Medical_Log_Ayaan.pdf, Page 1.
